name: Rogue DHCP Server Detected
description: Detects unauthorized DHCP servers on the network
query:
// Rogue DHCP Server Detection (NDR)
// DHCP offers - review source_ip against known DHCP servers
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "dhcp"
  and message_type = "DHCPOFFER"
group by source_ip, source_mac
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
